cards.upgradedRules: If the chosen tile is Scanned as a mine, Detonate it and deal 20 damage to the targeted enemy. Otherwise, Scan it and gain 8 Block. Afterward, lose 1 HP and gain 3 picks.
cards.intendedArchetypeOrRole: Known-mine payoff with Grave class sequencing
cards.existingEntrySystem: Uncommon combat reward or merchant stock for this Delver.
cards.keepOrRemove: Keep when the deck supports known-mine payoff; remove if it dilutes a tighter plan.
cards.exampleUseCase: Set up with one Scan, then cash the certainty into a large hit.
cards.balanceRisks: Two-card setup must outperform generic attacks without dominating. Pick-heavy Revenant turns may become too long.
cards.overlap: No exact existing-card match; monitor the noted recipe family.

cards.name: Grave: Clean Sequence
cards.rules: Scan the chosen hidden tile. If it is safe, Reveal it; if it is mined, Defuse it. Afterward, lose 1 HP and gain 1 Energy.
cards.upgradedRules: Scan the chosen hidden tile. If it is safe, Reveal it; if it is mined, Defuse it. Gain 1 pick. Afterward, lose 1 HP and gain 1 Energy.
cards.intendedArchetypeOrRole: Guaranteed tile resolution with Grave class sequencing
cards.existingEntrySystem: Uncommon combat reward or merchant stock for this Delver.
cards.keepOrRemove: Keep when the deck supports guaranteed tile resolution; remove if it dilutes a tighter plan.
cards.exampleUseCase: Safely resolve a critical tile regardless of its contents.
cards.balanceRisks: Deterministic resolution is premium board control. Energy refunds may enable long turns despite the voluntary HP cost.
cards.overlap: No exact existing-card match; monitor the noted recipe family.

cards.name: Grave: Flag Economy
cards.rules: Verified-flag 2 random hidden mines, then draw 1 card. Afterward, lose 1 HP and gain 5 Block.
cards.upgradedRules: Verified-flag 3 random hidden mines, then draw 1 card. Afterward, lose 1 HP and gain 7 Block.
cards.intendedArchetypeOrRole: Flag consistency with Grave class sequencing
cards.existingEntrySystem: Rare combat reward or merchant stock for this Delver.
cards.keepOrRemove: Keep when the deck supports flag consistency; remove if it dilutes a tighter plan.
cards.exampleUseCase: Seed guaranteed flags for Chord and mine-payoff cards.
cards.balanceRisks: Random guaranteed knowledge can bypass too much deduction. The Block can make the HP trade favorable too consistently.
cards.overlap: No exact existing-card match; monitor the noted recipe family.

cards.name: Grave: Grand Survey
cards.rules: Scan every hidden tile adjacent to the chosen number. Gain 1 Energy for every 3 mines found, up to 2 Energy. Afterward, lose 1 HP and gain 2 picks.
cards.upgradedRules: Scan every hidden tile adjacent to the chosen number. Gain 1 Energy for every 2 mines found, up to 2 Energy. Afterward, lose 1 HP and gain 3 picks.
cards.intendedArchetypeOrRole: Dense-cluster engine with Grave class sequencing
cards.existingEntrySystem: Rare combat reward or merchant stock for this Delver.
cards.keepOrRemove: Keep when the deck supports dense-cluster engine; remove if it dilutes a tighter plan.
cards.exampleUseCase: Analyze a high-number neighborhood and refund energy from confirmed danger.
cards.balanceRisks: Energy refunds plus Surveyor triggers can approach a free mass Scan. Pick-heavy Revenant turns may become too long.
cards.recommendedNumericalTuningRange: 1 Energy per 2–3 mines; cap 2; 1 HP for 2–3 picks
cards.overlap: No exact existing-card match; monitor the noted recipe family.

cards.name: Grave: Full-Clear Aspirant
cards.rules: Entomb up to 2 chosen hidden tiles. Draw 1 card. Exhaust. Afterward, lose 1 HP and gain 1 Energy.
cards.upgradedRules: Entomb up to 2 chosen hidden tiles. Draw 2 cards. Exhaust. Afterward, lose 1 HP and gain 1 Energy.
cards.intendedArchetypeOrRole: Entomb build-around with Grave class sequencing
cards.existingEntrySystem: Rare combat reward or merchant stock for this Delver.
cards.keepOrRemove: Keep when the deck supports entomb build-around; remove if it dilutes a tighter plan.
cards.exampleUseCase: Remove two stubborn cells from the solve and thin this card for combat.
cards.balanceRisks: Repeated copies could force Full Clear with little deduction. Energy refunds may enable long turns despite the voluntary HP cost.
cards.overlap: No exact existing-card match; monitor the noted recipe family.

cards.name: Grave: Mine Symphony
cards.rules: Detonate up to 3 flagged mines. For each mine detonated, deal 14 damage to all enemies. Safe flags are Revealed normally. Afterward, lose 1 HP and gain 5 Block.
cards.upgradedRules: Detonate up to 3 flagged mines. For each mine detonated, deal 17 damage to all enemies. Safe flags are Revealed normally. Afterward, lose 1 HP and gain 7 Block.
cards.intendedArchetypeOrRole: Flagged-mine finisher with Grave class sequencing
cards.existingEntrySystem: Rare combat reward or merchant stock for this Delver.
cards.keepOrRemove: Keep when the deck supports flagged-mine finisher; remove if it dilutes a tighter plan.
cards.exampleUseCase: Turn three proven flags into a major area attack.
cards.balanceRisks: Free manual flags make oracle play disproportionately strong. The Block can make the HP trade favorable too consistently.
cards.overlap: No exact existing-card match; monitor the noted recipe family.

cards.name: Grave: Open Ledger
cards.rules: Reveal up to 3 chosen hidden tiles. Deal 4 damage to the targeted enemy for each safe tile revealed. Afterward, lose 1 HP and gain 2 picks.
cards.upgradedRules: Reveal up to 3 chosen hidden tiles. Deal 6 damage to the targeted enemy for each safe tile revealed. Afterward, lose 1 HP and gain 3 picks.
cards.intendedArchetypeOrRole: Multi-tile risk with Grave class sequencing
cards.existingEntrySystem: Rare combat reward or merchant stock for this Delver.
cards.keepOrRemove: Keep when the deck supports multi-tile risk; remove if it dilutes a tighter plan.
cards.exampleUseCase: Select only tiles supported by deduction for a large focused hit.
cards.balanceRisks: Instinct can blunt the risk of selecting uncertain tiles. Pick-heavy Revenant turns may become too long.
cards.recommendedNumericalTuningRange: 4–6 per safe tile; 1 HP for 2–3 picks
cards.overlap: No exact existing-card match; monitor the noted recipe family.

cards.name: Grave: Adaptive Works
cards.rules: On a tile numbered 2 or higher, build a Sentry that deals 6 damage each turn. Otherwise, build a Relay that grants 3 Block each turn. Afterward, lose 1 HP and gain 1 Energy.
cards.upgradedRules: On a tile numbered 2 or higher, build a Sentry that deals 8 damage each turn. Otherwise, build a Relay that grants 4 Block each turn. Afterward, lose 1 HP and gain 1 Energy.
cards.intendedArchetypeOrRole: Adaptive construct with Grave class sequencing
cards.existingEntrySystem: Rare combat reward or merchant stock for this Delver.
cards.keepOrRemove: Keep when the deck supports adaptive construct; remove if it dilutes a tighter plan.
cards.exampleUseCase: Let board position decide whether the deck gains offense or information-defense.
cards.balanceRisks: The Sentry branch may always be preferable on normal boards. Energy refunds may enable long turns despite the voluntary HP cost.
cards.recommendedNumericalTuningRange: 6–8 damage or 3–4 Block; 1 HP for 1 Energy
cards.overlap: No exact existing-card match; monitor the noted recipe family.

cards.name: Grave: Stone Exchange
cards.rules: Entomb the chosen hidden tile, then add 2 safe tiles to the board’s edge Scanned as safe. Afterward, lose 1 HP and gain 5 Block.
cards.upgradedRules: Entomb the chosen hidden tile, then add 3 safe tiles to the board’s edge Scanned as safe. Afterward, lose 1 HP and gain 7 Block.
cards.intendedArchetypeOrRole: Board-shape strategy with Grave class sequencing
cards.existingEntrySystem: Rare combat reward or merchant stock for this Delver.
cards.keepOrRemove: Keep when the deck supports board-shape strategy; remove if it dilutes a tighter plan.
cards.exampleUseCase: Seal a dangerous cell while creating known construction space.
cards.balanceRisks: Net board growth may stall Full Clear despite safe information. The Block can make the HP trade favorable too consistently.
cards.overlap: No exact existing-card match; monitor the noted recipe family.

cards.name: Grave: Last Pick
cards.rules: Playable only with no picks. Gain 2 picks and draw 1 card. Exhaust. Afterward, lose 1 HP and gain 2 picks.
cards.upgradedRules: Playable only with no picks. Gain 3 picks and draw 2 cards. Exhaust. Afterward, lose 1 HP and gain 3 picks.
cards.intendedArchetypeOrRole: Empty-pick recovery with Grave class sequencing
cards.existingEntrySystem: Rare combat reward or merchant stock for this Delver.
cards.keepOrRemove: Keep when the deck supports empty-pick recovery; remove if it dilutes a tighter plan.
cards.exampleUseCase: Spend normal picks first, then reopen the turn and cycle.
cards.balanceRisks: With draw and pick-spending attacks this can extend turns too far. Pick-heavy Revenant turns may become too long.
cards.overlap: No exact existing-card match; monitor the noted recipe family.

cards.name: Grave: Dense Ground
cards.rules: Deal 1 damage to all enemies for every 2 hidden mines, up to 18. Afterward, lose 1 HP and gain 1 Energy.
cards.upgradedRules: Deal 1 damage to all enemies for every 1 hidden mines, up to 24. Afterward, lose 1 HP and gain 1 Energy.
cards.intendedArchetypeOrRole: Dense-board payoff with Grave class sequencing
cards.existingEntrySystem: Rare combat reward or merchant stock for this Delver.
cards.keepOrRemove: Keep when the deck supports dense-board payoff; remove if it dilutes a tighter plan.
cards.exampleUseCase: Attack early while the board still contains many mines.
cards.balanceRisks: Upgrade scaling at one damage per mine can dominate late strata. Energy refunds may enable long turns despite the voluntary HP cost.
cards.recommendedNumericalTuningRange: 1 per 1–2 mines; 18–24 cap; 1 HP for 1 Energy
cards.overlap: No exact existing-card match; monitor the noted recipe family.

cards.name: Grave: Clear Ground
cards.rules: Deal 1 damage to the targeted enemy for every 2 revealed tiles, up to 20. Afterward, lose 1 HP and gain 5 Block.
cards.upgradedRules: Deal 1 damage to the targeted enemy for every 1 revealed tiles, up to 28. Afterward, lose 1 HP and gain 7 Block.
cards.intendedArchetypeOrRole: Open-board payoff with Grave class sequencing
cards.existingEntrySystem: Rare combat reward or merchant stock for this Delver.
cards.keepOrRemove: Keep when the deck supports open-board payoff; remove if it dilutes a tighter plan.

cards.balanceRisks: Large cascades can turn this into a generic capped nuke. The Block can make the HP trade favorable too consistently.
cards.recommendedNumericalTuningRange: 1 per 1–2 tiles; 20–28 cap; 1 HP for 5–7 Block
cards.overlap: No exact existing-card match; monitor the noted recipe family.

cards.name: Grave: Verified Arsenal
cards.rules: Defuse up to 4 verified-flagged mines. Deal 3 damage to all enemies for each mine removed. Afterward, lose 1 HP and gain 2 picks.
cards.upgradedRules: Defuse up to 5 verified-flagged mines. Deal 5 damage to all enemies for each mine removed. Afterward, lose 1 HP and gain 3 picks.
cards.intendedArchetypeOrRole: Verified-flag payoff with Grave class sequencing
cards.existingEntrySystem: Rare combat reward or merchant stock for this Delver.
cards.keepOrRemove: Keep when the deck supports verified-flag payoff; remove if it dilutes a tighter plan.

cards.balanceRisks: Cards that create verified flags may make this too deterministic. Pick-heavy Revenant turns may become too long.
cards.recommendedNumericalTuningRange: 3–5 per mine; 4–5 mines; 1 HP for 2–3 picks
cards.overlap: No exact existing-card match; monitor the noted recipe family.

cards.name: Grave: Reversal
cards.rules: Swap the two chosen hidden tiles. Defuse the first and Scan the second. If the first contained a mine after the swap, deal 18 damage to the targeted enemy. Afterward, lose 1 HP and gain 1 Energy.
cards.upgradedRules: Swap the two chosen hidden tiles. Defuse the first and Scan the second. If the first contained a mine after the swap, deal 22 damage to the targeted enemy. Afterward, lose 1 HP and gain 1 Energy.
cards.intendedArchetypeOrRole: Sequence manipulation with Grave class sequencing
cards.existingEntrySystem: Rare combat reward or merchant stock for this Delver.
cards.keepOrRemove: Keep when the deck supports sequence manipulation; remove if it dilutes a tighter plan.
cards.exampleUseCase: Move a known mine into the first slot, then cash it out while checking the other.
cards.balanceRisks: Known scans can make the setup deterministic. Energy refunds may enable long turns despite the voluntary HP cost.
cards.overlap: No exact existing-card match; monitor the noted recipe family.

cards.name: Grave: Cartographer’s Coup
cards.rules: Scan every hidden tile in the chosen row. Reveal up to 4 tiles Scanned as safe and verified-flag every tile Scanned as a mine. Exhaust. Afterward, lose 1 HP and gain 5 Block.
cards.upgradedRules: Scan every hidden tile in the chosen row. Reveal up to 6 tiles Scanned as safe and verified-flag every tile Scanned as a mine. Exhaust. Afterward, lose 1 HP and gain 7 Block.
cards.intendedArchetypeOrRole: Showcase row control with Grave class sequencing
cards.existingEntrySystem: Rare combat reward or merchant stock for this Delver.
cards.keepOrRemove: Keep when the deck supports showcase row control; remove if it dilutes a tighter plan.
cards.exampleUseCase: Resolve the information state of a crucial row before a boss action.
cards.balanceRisks: This approaches deterministic board solving; cost and Exhaust are mandatory. The Block can make the HP trade favorable too consistently.
cards.overlap: A much broader, exhausting counterpart to Cross Section.

cards.name: Grave: Controlled Collapse
cards.rules: Entomb up to 3 chosen hidden tiles. Deal 5 damage to all enemies for each tile Entombed. Exhaust. Afterward, lose 1 HP and gain 2 picks.
cards.upgradedRules: Entomb up to 3 chosen hidden tiles. Deal 7 damage to all enemies for each tile Entombed. Exhaust. Afterward, lose 1 HP and gain 3 picks.
cards.intendedArchetypeOrRole: Entomb finisher with Grave class sequencing
cards.existingEntrySystem: Rare combat reward or merchant stock for this Delver.
cards.keepOrRemove: Keep when the deck supports entomb finisher; remove if it dilutes a tighter plan.

cards.balanceRisks: Three Entombs provide exceptional Full Clear progress. Pick-heavy Revenant turns may become too long.
cards.overlap: No exact existing-card match; monitor the noted recipe family.

cards.name: Grave: Perfect Deduction
cards.rules: If every adjacent flag is correct and their count equals the chosen number, Chord it, gain 1 Energy, draw 2 cards, and deal 12 damage to all enemies. Otherwise, Scan all adjacent hidden tiles. Exhaust. Afterward, lose 1 HP and gain 1 Energy.
cards.upgradedRules: If every adjacent flag is correct and their count equals the chosen number, Chord it, gain 2 Energy, draw 3 cards, and deal 16 damage to all enemies. Otherwise, Scan all adjacent hidden tiles. Exhaust. Afterward, lose 1 HP and gain 1 Energy.
cards.intendedArchetypeOrRole: Perfect-deduction showcase with Grave class sequencing
cards.existingEntrySystem: Rare combat reward or merchant stock for this Delver.
cards.keepOrRemove: Keep when the deck supports perfect-deduction showcase; remove if it dilutes a tighter plan.
cards.exampleUseCase: Prove an entire neighborhood to unlock a complete tempo swing.
cards.balanceRisks: Energy plus draw can seed combo turns; Exhaust limits repetition. Energy refunds may enable long turns despite the voluntary HP cost.
cards.recommendedNumericalTuningRange: 1–2 Energy; 2–3 cards; 12–16 damage; 1 HP for 1 Energy
cards.overlap: No exact existing-card match; monitor the noted recipe family.

cards.name: Grave: Mine Harvest

cards.existingEntrySystem: Rare combat reward or merchant stock for this Delver.
